sent_posts.post: 📈 Before the Bell SIP inflows hit a record Rs 31,781 crore in June. This shows retail investors are staying committed. Keep an eye on how this steady flow affects long-term stability in the market. For information only. #Investing #MutualFunds

🚨 Market Update: From Sept 1, SEBI allows mutual funds to use intraday borrowing for wider purposes. This improves fund liquidity and management, making it easier for funds to operate. #Investing #MutualFunds For information only.

📌 Stock Focus: TCS recently beat earnings estimates for the first quarter. It matters because investors watch how top IT firms perform to gauge the sector's health. Good results often draw attention from analysts. For information only. #TCS #Stocks

🟢 Market Close Sensex jumped 828 pts and Nifty topped 24,200 as the recovery continued. Big gains followed strong earnings and firm institutional activity. Watch FII flows next session to see if this trend stays. For information only. #Stocks #Nifty

💡 Tip: Only invest in companies you understand. If you can’t explain their business model simply, you can’t accurately track their long-term growth. Stay safe by sticking to what you know. #Investing For information only.

📚 Learn Today A rising stock price doesn't mean the business is doing better. Sometimes, it’s just hype. Always check if the actual profits are growing, or you might end up overpaying for a weak company. For information only. #Investing #Stocks

📋 Today's Watch Crude oil prices are climbing due to tensions in the Middle East. Keep an eye on oil, as higher energy costs often impact company profits and domestic inflation. Stay alert today. For information only. #OilPrices #Investing
📌 Stock Focus: DMart shares fell 4% as quick commerce hurts its growth in major cities. This shows how shifting shopping habits impact retail giants. #DMart #Stocks For information only.
